title: Museo de Bellas Artes
description: Located in a restored colonial building, this museum showcases Mexican art from the 18th century to the present. With rotating exhibitions, sculpture gardens, and cultural events, it’s a hub for visual storytelling and artistic exploration.

title: Calixtlahuaca Archaeological Zone
description: Just outside the city, this pre-Hispanic site features pyramids, ceremonial platforms, and panoramic views of the Toluca Valley. It’s a quiet, educational escape into the region’s indigenous past.

title: Parque Matlatzinca
description: A forested park with walking trails, playgrounds, and open-air spaces for sports and picnics. Surrounded by native trees and fresh mountain air, it’s a favorite spot for locals seeking nature and relaxation.
